scripts.clean:native: pnpm --filter @loom-dev/compiler run clean && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/layout-engine run clean && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-analysis run clean
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:native && turbo run dev --filter=@loom-dev/preview-harness
scripts.dev:compiler: pnpm run build:native && turbo run dev --filter=@loom-dev/compiler-harness
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:native && turbo run build --filter=@loom-dev/preview-runtime --filter=@loom-dev/preview-engine && turbo run typecheck --filter=@loom-dev/preview-runtime --filter=@loom-dev/preview-engine --filter=@loom-dev/preview --filter=loom-dev --filter=@loom-dev/preview-harness --filter=@loom-dev/compiler-harness
scripts.test: pnpm run build:native && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/compiler build:wasm && turbo run test --filter=@loom-dev/layout-engine --filter=@loom-dev/preview-analysis && pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome format --write package.json turbo.json biome.json tsconfig.base.json README.md scripts && turbo run format --filter=@loom-dev/layout-engine --filter=@loom-dev/compiler --filter=@loom-dev/preview-runtime --filter=@loom-dev/preview-engine --filter=@loom-dev/preview-analysis --filter=@loom-dev/preview --filter=loom-dev --filter=@loom-dev/preview-harness --filter=@loom-dev/compiler-harness
scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome check package.json turbo.json biome.json tsconfig.base.json README.md scripts && turbo run lint --filter=@loom-dev/layout-engine --filter=@loom-dev/compiler --filter=@loom-dev/preview-runtime --filter=@loom-dev/preview-engine --filter=@loom-dev/preview-analysis --filter=@loom-dev/preview --filter=loom-dev --filter=@loom-dev/preview-harness --filter=@loom-dev/compiler-harness
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec biome check --write --unsafe package.json turbo.json biome.json tsconfig.base.json README.md scripts && turbo run lint:fix --filter=@loom-dev/layout-engine --filter=@loom-dev/compiler --filter=@loom-dev/preview-runtime --filter=@loom-dev/preview-engine --filter=@loom-dev/preview-analysis --filter=@loom-dev/preview --filter=loom-dev --filter=@loom-dev/preview-harness --filter=@loom-dev/compiler-harness
scripts.verify:dts: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run build:packages && tsx ./scripts/verify-generated-dts.ts
